code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Step 1: Get company 2467's location
query_company = text("""
SELECT id, name, coordinate, district_id, city_id
FROM polluting_company
WHERE id = 2467
""")
company_df = pd.read_sql(query_company, engine)
print("Company info:")
print(company_df[['id', 'name', 'district_id', 'city_id']])
if len(company_df) > 0:
    company_coord = company_df['coordinate'].values[0]
    company_name = company_df['name'].values[0]
    print(f"\nCompany coordinate: {company_coord}")
else:
    print("Company 2467 not found!")
    company_coord = None
    company_name = "UNKNOWN"

# Step 2: Fetch hourly emission data for company 2467
if company_coord is not None:
    query_emission = text("""
    SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, hc, nmhc, co, hcl
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
    WHERE company_id = 2467
      AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 22:00:00'
      AND timestamp < '2025-06-11 02:00:00'
    ORDER BY timestamp
    """)
    emission_df = pd.read_sql(query_emission, engine)
    print(f"\nEmission data row count: {len(emission_df)}")
    if len(emission_df) > 0:
        print("\nEmission data summary:")
        print(emission_df[['timestamp', 'exhaust_gas', 'nox']].to_string(index=False))
        print(f"\nTotal exhaust_gas: {emission_df['exhaust_gas'].sum()}")
        print(f"Peak exhaust_gas: {emission_df['exhaust_gas'].max()}")
        print(f"Total NOx: {emission_df['nox'].sum()}")
        print(f"Peak NOx: {emission_df['nox'].max()}")
    else:
        print("No emission data found for company 2467 in the time window!")
else:
    emission_df = pd.DataFrame()

# Step 3: Find air quality stations within 10km of the company
if company_coord is not None:
    query_stations = text("""
    SELECT aqs.id as station_id, aqs.name as station_name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name,
           ST_Distance(aqs.coordinate, %(coord)s) as distance_m
    FROM air_quality_station aqs
    LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
    WHERE ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, %(coord)s, 10000)
    ORDER BY distance_m
    """)
    stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine, params={'coord': company_coord})
    print(f"\nStations within 10km: {len(stations_df)}")
    if len(stations_df) > 0:
        print(stations_df.to_string(index=False))
    else:
        print("No stations found within 10km!")
else:
    stations_df = pd.DataFrame()

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

company_coord_str = "0101000020E61000002A38BC2022865D40CDCCCCCCCC9C4340"

query_stations = text(f"""
    SELECT aqs.id as station_id, aqs.name as station_name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name,
           ST_Distance(aqs.coordinate, '{company_coord_str}'::geography) as distance_m
    FROM air_quality_station aqs
    LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
    WHERE ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, '{company_coord_str}'::geography, 10000)
    ORDER BY distance_m
""")

stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine)
print(f"Stations within 10km: {len(stations_df)}")
if len(stations_df) > 0:
    print(stations_df.to_string(index=False))
else:
    print("No stations found within 10km!")

# Stage findings for synthesis agent
my_total_flue_gas = 119484700.0
my_peak_flue_gas = 30378400.0
my_total_nox = 669.143
my_stations_within_10km = len(stations_df)

print(f"\nStaged findings:")
print(f"my_total_flue_gas: {my_total_flue_gas}")
print(f"my_peak_flue_gas: {my_peak_flue_gas}")
print(f"my_total_nox: {my_total_nox}")
print(f"my_stations_within_10km: {my_stations_within_10km}")

print("已存在的变量值：")
print(f"my_total_flue_gas: {my_total_flue_gas}")
print(f"my_peak_flue_gas: {my_peak_flue_gas}")
print(f"my_total_nox: {my_total_nox}")
print(f"my_stations_within_10km: {my_stations_within_10km}")

# Reuse the intermediate variables already computed by upstream agents
total_flue_gas = my_total_flue_gas
peak_flue_gas = my_peak_flue_gas
total_nox = my_total_nox
stations_within_10km = my_stations_within_10km

# Print the final results for verification
print(f"total_flue_gas: {total_flue_gas}")
print(f"peak_flue_gas: {peak_flue_gas}")
print(f"total_nox: {total_nox}")
print(f"stations_within_10km: {stations_within_10km}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Step 1: Get company 2467 location
query_company = text("""
SELECT id, name, coordinate FROM polluting_company WHERE id = 2467
""")
company_df = pd.read_sql(query_company, engine)
print("Company info:")
print(company_df[['id', 'name']])

# Get coordinates
company_coord = company_df['coordinate'].values[0]
company_name = company_df['name'].values[0]
print(f"\nCompany: {company_name}")
print(f"Coordinate: {company_coord}")

# Step 2: Query emission data for the time window 2025-06-10 22:00 to 2025-06-11 02:00
# Time window: start-inclusive, end-exclusive
query_emission = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox 
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission 
WHERE company_id = 2467 
AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 22:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-06-11 02:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
emission_df = pd.read_sql(query_emission, engine)
print(f"\nEmission records count: {len(emission_df)}")
print(emission_df)

# Step 3: Compute total_flue_gas, peak_flue_gas, total_nox
total_flue_gas = float(emission_df['exhaust_gas'].sum())
peak_flue_gas = float(emission_df['exhaust_gas'].max())
total_nox = float(emission_df['nox'].sum())

print(f"\nComputed values:")
print(f"total_flue_gas: {total_flue_gas}")
print(f"peak_flue_gas: {peak_flue_gas}")
print(f"total_nox: {total_nox}")

# Step 4: Query air quality stations within 10km of company
query_stations = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) as station_count 
FROM air_quality_station aqs 
WHERE ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, %s, 10000)
""")
stations_result = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine, params=[company_coord])
stations_within_10km = int(stations_result['station_count'].values[0])

print(f"\nStations within 10km: {stations_within_10km}")

# Store results
total_flue_gas = total_flue_gas
peak_flue_gas = peak_flue_gas
total_nox = total_nox
stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Fix the stations query - use direct string formatting instead of params
query_stations = text(f"""
SELECT COUNT(*) as station_count 
FROM air_quality_station aqs 
WHERE ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, ST_GeomFromText('0101000020E61000002A38BC2022865D40CDCCCCCCCC9C4340', 4326), 10000)
""")
stations_result = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine)
stations_within_10km = int(stations_result['station_count'].values[0])
print(f"Stations within 10km: {stations_within_10km}")

# Verify emission calculations
print(f"\nVerification:")
print(f"total_flue_gas: {total_flue_gas}")
print(f"peak_flue_gas: {peak_flue_gas}")
print(f"total_nox: {total_nox}")

# Assign final values
total_flue_gas = total_flue_gas
peak_flue_gas = peak_flue_gas
total_nox = total_nox
stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Get company coordinates as lon/lat
query_coords = text("""
SELECT ST_X(coordinate) as lon, ST_Y(coordinate) as lat 
FROM polluting_company WHERE id = 2467
""")
coords_df = pd.read_sql(query_coords, engine)
lon = coords_df['lon'].values[0]
lat = coords_df['lat'].values[0]
print(f"Company coordinates: lon={lon}, lat={lat}")

# Query stations within 10km using haversine distance
query_stations = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) as station_count 
FROM air_quality_station aqs 
WHERE ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(%s, %s), 4326)::geography, 10000)
""")
stations_result = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine, params=[lon, lat])
stations_within_10km = int(stations_result['station_count'].values[0])
print(f"Stations within 10km: {stations_within_10km}")

# Verify emission calculations from previous execution
print(f"\nVerification of emission values:")
print(f"total_flue_gas: {total_flue_gas}")
print(f"peak_flue_gas: {peak_flue_gas}")
print(f"total_nox: {total_nox}")

# Assign final values
total_flue_gas = total_flue_gas
peak_flue_gas = peak_flue_gas
total_nox = total_nox
stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km

print(f"\nFinal values:")
print(f"total_flue_gas: {total_flue_gas}")
print(f"peak_flue_gas: {peak_flue_gas}")
print(f"total_nox: {total_nox}")
print(f"stations_within_10km: {stations_within_10km}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Query stations within 10km using subquery to avoid geography casting issues
query_stations = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) as station_count 
FROM air_quality_station aqs 
WHERE ST_DWithin(aqs.coordinate, (SELECT coordinate FROM polluting_company WHERE id = 2467), 10000)
""")
stations_result = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine)
stations_within_10km = int(stations_result['station_count'].values[0])
print(f"Stations within 10km: {stations_within_10km}")

# Verify emission calculations from previous execution
print(f"\nVerification of emission values:")
print(f"total_flue_gas: {total_flue_gas}")
print(f"peak_flue_gas: {peak_flue_gas}")
print(f"total_nox: {total_nox}")

# Assign final values
total_flue_gas = total_flue_gas
peak_flue_gas = peak_flue_gas
total_nox = total_nox
stations_within_10km = stations_within_10km

print(f"\nFinal values:")
print(f"total_flue_gas: {total_flue_gas}")
print(f"peak_flue_gas: {peak_flue_gas}")
print(f"total_nox: {total_nox}")
print(f"stations_within_10km: {stations_within_10km}")
